CodeBlockMethod.Name: ShowLadderForOwner
CodeBlockMethod.Code: if self.Target == nil then return end if triggerEntity == _UserService.LocalPlayer then self.Target.Visible = true self.Target.Enable = true log("[CLIENT] 나만 보이는 사다리!") end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local triggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity if triggerBodyEntity == nil then return end
self:ShowLadderForOwner(triggerBodyEntity) log("[SERVER] " .. tostring(triggerBodyEntity.Name) .. "가 밟음")
